response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff/Senior Software Engineer with an impressive background in full-stack web development, microservices, and software craftsmanship. However, he is not a fit for this Principal Performance Architect position because his experience lacks the required focus on hardware-software co-design, SoC/IP modeling, and AI accelerator optimization. The role requires deep expertise in GPU architectures, SIMD/MIMD, and deep-learning hardware bottlenecks, whereas Bogdan's expertise lies primarily in high-level software, GIS platforms, and web infrastructure.
strengths: Extensive 15+ years of software engineering experience across full-stack, web, and high-performance microservices.
Demonstrated ability to work with low-level and high-performance systems programming languages like C, C++, and DLang.
Meets the baseline requirement for education and total years of professional technical experience.
concerns: No demonstrated experience in SoC and IP modeling or hardware-software co-design.
Lacks background in AI hardware accelerators, GPU architecture, or deep learning workload optimization.
Experience is primarily focused on web platforms and full-stack development rather than cloud infrastructure hardware optimization.
